economic_notes: Tulita Developments Ltd (100% subsidiary) operates forestry services and commercial rentals. Tulita District Investment Company investment held at cost due to unavailable information for modified equity method.
notes: Audit is qualified due to: (1) donations and fundraising revenues not susceptible to audit verification; (2) inability to obtain information to account for Tulita District Investment Company under modified equity method. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $70,259 to $802,128 due to $777,590 in new deferred Indigenous Services Canada funding. The subsidiary Tulita Developments Ltd is consolidated using modified equity method with investment of $962,790. Tulita District Investment Company recorded at cost of $5,000 only. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Budget figures included in Statement II but noted as unaudited.
